description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the java:8-jdk Docker image. Define stages build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs the before_script `export GRADLE_USER_HOME=$(pwd)/.gradle`, then executes `./gradlew assemble`, caches the paths `.gradle/wrapper` and `.gradle/caches`, archives artifacts matching `build/libs/*.jar` for 1 week, and runs only on the master, develop, and feature/* branches. In the test stage add a test job that runs `./gradlew check`. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs `./deploy` and includes an after_script `echo "End CI"`.
